# MoteCloud Public Docs For AI Readers

This repository contains public MoteCloud documentation only.

Use these pages for product concepts, public integration guidance, public benchmark context, changelog information, and safe high-level descriptions of MoteCloud memory workflows.

Do not infer that this repository contains tenant-specific setup, admin runbooks, private security evidence, private source code, internal deployment details, or unreleased benchmark artifacts.

Important public pages:

- Overview: docs/overview.md
- Quickstart: docs/quickstart.md
- Memory primitives: docs/concepts/memory-primitives.md
- Context priming: docs/concepts/context-priming.md
- Agent memory: docs/concepts/agent-memory.md
- Retrieval and graphs: docs/concepts/retrieval-and-graphs.md
- Privacy and documentation boundaries: docs/concepts/privacy-and-boundaries.md
- MCP usage: docs/guides/using-mcp.md
- API usage: docs/guides/using-the-api.md
- Agent usage: docs/guides/using-agents.md
- API reference overview: docs/reference/api.md
- MCP tools reference: docs/reference/mcp-tools.md
- Benchmark overview: docs/benchmarks/overview.md
- Benchmark methodology: docs/benchmarks/methodology.md
- Public status: docs/operations/public-status.md

Public GitHub repositories should use the https://github.com/motecloud/ organization.
